name: BLE Server
description: The `esp32_ble_server` component in ESPHome sets up a BLE GATT server that exposes the device name, manufacturer and board. BLE GATT services and characteristics can be added to the server to expose data and control.

config_entries.label: Model
config_entries.description: The model name of the device. Defaults to the project's name defined in the [core configuration](https://esphome.io/components/esphome#esphome-creators_project) if present, otherwise to the friendly name of the `board` chosen in the [core configuration](https://esphome.io/components/esphome#configuration-variables).

config_entries.label: Type
config_entries.description: The C++ type of the value. The available values are uint8_t, uint16_t, uint32_t, uint64_t, int8_t, int16_t, int32_t, int64_t, float, double and string. It must be defined if the value is not templatable.

config_entries.label: Data
config_entries.description: The value of the characteristic or descriptor. For templatable values, the lambda function must return a std::vector<uint8_t> (you may use the bytebuffer::ByteBuffer helper class to transform different data types into a byte array). The value is computed each time the characteristic is read.

config_entries.label: Endianness
config_entries.description: The endianness of the value. Can be BIG or LITTLE. Defaults to LITTLE.

config_entries.label: String Encoding
config_entries.description: The encoding of the string. Only applicable if the type is string. The conversion is done in Python before compilation, so the encoding must be a valid Python encoding. Defaults to utf-8.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The ID of the descriptor to set the value of.

config_entries.label: Appearance
config_entries.description: Sets the [appearance](https://bitbucket.org/bluetooth-SIG/public/src/main/assigned_numbers/core/appearance_values.yaml) of the device (included in advertising data.) Defaults to `0`.

config_entries.label: Firmware Version
config_entries.description: The firmware version of the device. Defaults to the project's version defined in the [core configuration](https://esphome.io/components/esphome#esphome-creators_project) if present, otherwise to the ESPHome version.

config_entries.label: Type
config_entries.description: The C++ type of the value. The available values are uint8_t, uint16_t, uint32_t, uint64_t, int8_t, int16_t, int32_t, int64_t, float, double and string. It must be defined if the value is not templatable.

config_entries.label: Data
config_entries.description: The value of the characteristic or descriptor. For templatable values, the lambda function must return a std::vector<uint8_t> (you may use the bytebuffer::ByteBuffer helper class to transform different data types into a byte array). The value is computed each time the characteristic is read.

config_entries.label: Endianness
config_entries.description: The endianness of the value. Can be BIG or LITTLE. Defaults to LITTLE.

config_entries.label: String Encoding
config_entries.description: The encoding of the string. Only applicable if the type is string. The conversion is done in Python before compilation, so the encoding must be a valid Python encoding. Defaults to utf-8.

config_entries.label: Manufacturer
config_entries.description: The name of the manufacturer/firmware creator. Defaults to `ESPHome`.

config_entries.label: Type
config_entries.description: The C++ type of the value. The available values are uint8_t, uint16_t, uint32_t, uint64_t, int8_t, int16_t, int32_t, int64_t, float, double and string. It must be defined if the value is not templatable.

config_entries.label: Data
config_entries.description: The value of the characteristic or descriptor. For templatable values, the lambda function must return a std::vector<uint8_t> (you may use the bytebuffer::ByteBuffer helper class to transform different data types into a byte array). The value is computed each time the characteristic is read.

config_entries.label: Endianness
config_entries.description: The endianness of the value. Can be BIG or LITTLE. Defaults to LITTLE.

config_entries.label: String Encoding
config_entries.description: The encoding of the string. Only applicable if the type is string. The conversion is done in Python before compilation, so the encoding must be a valid Python encoding. Defaults to utf-8.

config_entries.label: Manufacturer Data
config_entries.description: The manufacturer-specific data to include in the advertising packet. Should be a list of bytes, where the first two are the little-endian representation of the 16-bit manufacturer ID as assigned by the Bluetooth SIG.

config_entries.label: Max Clients
config_entries.description: The maximum number of simultaneous BLE client connections the server will accept. When set to a value greater than 1, the server resumes advertising after a client connects so that additional clients can discover and connect, up to this limit. Must not exceed the `max_connections` value configured in the [ESP32 BLE](https://esphome.io/components/esp32_ble) component. Defaults to `1`. Range: 1 to 9.

config_entries.label: Services
config_entries.description: A list of services to expose on the BLE GATT server.

config_entries.label: Advertise
config_entries.description: If the service should be advertised. Defaults to false.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: An ID to refer to this characteristic in automations.

config_entries.label: Broadcast
config_entries.description: If the characteristic should be broadcast. Defaults to false.

config_entries.label: Type
config_entries.description: The C++ type of the value. The available values are uint8_t, uint16_t, uint32_t, uint64_t, int8_t, int16_t, int32_t, int64_t, float, double and string. It must be defined if the value is not templatable.

config_entries.label: Data
config_entries.description: The value of the characteristic or descriptor. For templatable values, the lambda function must return a std::vector<uint8_t> (you may use the bytebuffer::ByteBuffer helper class to transform different data types into a byte array). The value is computed each time the characteristic is read.

config_entries.label: Endianness
config_entries.description: The endianness of the value. Can be BIG or LITTLE. Defaults to LITTLE.

config_entries.label: String Encoding
config_entries.description: The encoding of the string. Only applicable if the type is string. The conversion is done in Python before compilation, so the encoding must be a valid Python encoding. Defaults to utf-8.

config_entries.label: Type
config_entries.description: The C++ type of the value. The available values are uint8_t, uint16_t, uint32_t, uint64_t, int8_t, int16_t, int32_t, int64_t, float, double and string. It must be defined if the value is not templatable.

config_entries.description: The value of the characteristic or descriptor. For templatable values, the lambda function must return a std::vector<uint8_t> (you may use the bytebuffer::ByteBuffer helper class to transform different data types into a byte array). The value is computed each time the characteristic is read.

config_entries.label: Endianness
config_entries.description: The endianness of the value. Can be BIG or LITTLE. Defaults to LITTLE.

config_entries.label: String Encoding
config_entries.description: The encoding of the string. Only applicable if the type is string. The conversion is done in Python before compilation, so the encoding must be a valid Python encoding. Defaults to utf-8.

config_entries.label: Indicate
config_entries.description: If the characteristic supports indications. If true, a CCCD descriptor will be automatically added to the characteristic. Defaults to false.

config_entries.label: Notify
config_entries.description: If the characteristic supports notifications. If true, a CCCD descriptor will be automatically added to the characteristic. Defaults to false.

config_entries.label: Read
config_entries.description: If the characteristic should be readable. Defaults to false.

config_entries.label: UUID
config_entries.description: The UUID of the characteristic.

config_entries.label: Type
config_entries.description: The C++ type of the value. The available values are uint8_t, uint16_t, uint32_t, uint64_t, int8_t, int16_t, int32_t, int64_t, float, double and string. It must be defined if the value is not templatable.

config_entries.label: Data
config_entries.description: The value of the characteristic or descriptor. For templatable values, the lambda function must return a std::vector<uint8_t> (you may use the bytebuffer::ByteBuffer helper class to transform different data types into a byte array). The value is computed each time the characteristic is read.

config_entries.label: Endianness
config_entries.description: The endianness of the value. Can be BIG or LITTLE. Defaults to LITTLE.

config_entries.label: String Encoding
config_entries.description: The encoding of the string. Only applicable if the type is string. The conversion is done in Python before compilation, so the encoding must be a valid Python encoding. Defaults to utf-8.

config_entries.label: Write
config_entries.description: If the characteristic should be writable. Defaults to false.

config_entries.label: Write No Response
config_entries.description: If the characteristic should be writable without a response. Defaults to false.

config_entries.label: UUID
config_entries.description: The UUID of the service.
